overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through dark ocean waters at night during a storm. The scene features operational radar and navigation displays with a dramatic lightning strike illuminating the sea.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating coastal waters at night

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the ocean surface and ship deck

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, navigating through dark stormy waters while monitoring the rotating radar sweep and navigation charts

metal and glass window frame surrounding the bridge view
circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing surrounding waters
digital map display showing green coastline and vessel position marker
blue screen showing vessel telemetry and navigation data
dark choppy sea extending to the horizon under stormy skies
metal safety railings on the port side of the bow deck
metal safety railings on the starboard side of the bow deck

segments.scene_description: A continuous first-person view from a ship's bridge navigating through dark coastal waters at night. The vessel's bow deck is visible through the bridge windows, framed by metal railings. Three operational displays show rotating radar, nautical charts with coastline, and telemetry data. At 24 seconds, a bright lightning flash temporarily illuminates the stormy sea ahead before returning to darkness. The ship maintains steady forward motion with no other vessels encountered.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy coastal environment. It begins with a view of the bow deck and metal railings framed by the bridge windows, while operational displays show rotating radar and nautical charts. As the vessel maintains its steady forward motion through the darkness, a sudden, bright lightning flash momentarily illuminates the turbulent sea ahead. The scene then shifts back into deep shadow, leaving only the glow of the telemetry data and the void of the night ocean as the ship continues its solitary journey.
